message:
style(models): use let-else for the first-char extraction in looks_like_api_key_env_var

Replace the \`match chars.next() { Some(c) => c, None => return false }\`
shape with the equivalent \`let Some(first) = chars.next() else { return false; };\`.
Same behavior, idiomatic clippy-clean form, drops two lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
